title: How many official versions are there for A Cruel Angels Thesis
display_title: How many official versions are there for A Cruel Angels Thesis
wikitext:
[]: How many official versions are there for A Cruel Angels Thesis?             Quote Post by Aniconomics » Sat Aug 17, 2024 8:44 pm I have got my hands on 01. A Cruel Angels Thesis 02. A Cruel Angels Thesis (Instrumental) 03. A Cruel Angels Thesis (2009 Version) 04. A Cruel Angels Thesis (2009 Version) (Off-Vocal) 05. A Cruel Angels Thesis (10th Anniversary Edition) 06. A Cruel Angels Thesis (Directors Edit) 07. A Cruel Angels Thesis (Anime Edit) 08. A Cruel Angels Thesis (Ambivalence Mix) 09. A Cruel Angels Thesis: Matsuri Spirit 10. A Cruel Angels Thesis: Matsuri Spirit (Off-Vocal) 11. A Cruel Angels Thesis (Harmonia Version) 12. A Cruel Angels Thesis (Directors Edit Version II) (feat. Misato, Rei, Asuka) 13. A Cruel Angels Thesis (feat. Yoko Takahashi & Philharmonic Orchestra) 14. A Cruel Angels Thesis (Original Karaoke) 15.A Cruel Angels Thesis (Cruel Lyricist’s Version) I can't tell the difference between the instrumental and the original karaoki versions Am I missing anything?

[]: Re: How many official versions are there for A Cruel Angels Thesis?             Quote Post by Diego the Lego » Mon Nov 10, 2025 2:00 am There's also the N64 rendition of A Cruel Angels Thesis.
